skills.name: pmx-discovery
skills.title: Product Discovery
skills.description: Explore new product ideas, validate problems, and structure early-stage discovery.

skills.name: pmx-brainstorm-ideas
skills.title: Brainstorm Ideas
skills.description: Generate and expand product or feature ideas from a goal, problem, or opportunity.

skills.name: pmx-define-problem
skills.title: Define Problem
skills.description: Frame a user or business problem precisely before solutioning.

skills.name: pmx-opportunity-solution-tree
skills.title: Opportunity Solution Tree
skills.description: Structure discovery using outcomes, opportunities, solutions, assumptions, and experiments.

skills.name: pmx-identify-assumptions
skills.title: Identify Assumptions
skills.description: Extract explicit and implicit assumptions from an idea, feature, or plan.

skills.name: pmx-prioritize-assumptions
skills.title: Prioritize Assumptions
skills.description: Rank assumptions by risk, uncertainty, and impact to decide what to validate first.

skills.name: pmx-design-experiments
skills.title: Design Experiments
skills.description: Design fast experiments to validate assumptions and reduce uncertainty.

skills.name: pmx-validate-ideas
skills.title: Validate Ideas
skills.description: Evaluate an idea using evidence, assumptions, and likely user value.

skills.name: pmx-user-interview
skills.title: User Interview
skills.description: Create a structured user interview plan, questions, and synthesis approach.

skills.name: pmx-interview-synthesis
skills.title: Interview Synthesis
skills.description: Turn interview notes into patterns, insights, and implications.

skills.name: pmx-persona-definition
skills.title: Persona Definition
skills.description: Define actionable personas or archetypes grounded in behavior and needs.

skills.name: pmx-customer-segmentation

skills.description: Segment users or customers into meaningful groups for product and GTM decisions.

skills.name: pmx-user-journey-map

skills.description: Map the user journey, friction points, emotions, and opportunities.

skills.name: pmx-jobs-to-be-done

skills.description: Frame product work around user jobs, circumstances, and desired progress.

skills.name: pmx-problem-interview-guide
skills.title: Problem Interview Guide
skills.description: Create an interview guide focused on understanding problems before proposing solutions.

skills.name: pmx-solution-interview-guide
skills.title: Solution Interview Guide
skills.description: Create an interview guide to test reactions to solution concepts or prototypes.

skills.name: pmx-survey-design
skills.title: Survey Design
skills.description: Design a survey that answers a specific product question with minimal bias.

skills.name: pmx-voice-of-customer
skills.title: Voice of Customer
skills.description: Summarize customer language, pains, and value signals from qualitative input.

skills.name: pmx-product-vision
skills.title: Product Vision
skills.description: Draft or refine a product vision that aligns the team around long-term direction.

skills.name: pmx-product-strategy

skills.description: Turn product goals into a coherent strategy with choices and trade-offs.

skills.name: pmx-strategy-pyramid

skills.description: Organize vision, strategy, goals, initiatives, and tasks into a coherent stack.

skills.name: pmx-value-proposition
skills.title: Value Proposition
skills.description: Define the core value proposition for a target customer segment.

skills.name: pmx-positioning-statement

skills.name: pmx-goal-setting-okrs

skills.name: pmx-north-star-metric

skills.description: Define and validate a North Star Metric and its supporting inputs.

skills.name: pmx-kpi-definition

skills.name: pmx-success-metrics

skills.name: pmx-metric-tree

skills.name: pmx-business-model-canvas

skills.description: Summarize the business model using the classic canvas structure.

skills.name: pmx-pricing-strategy

skills.description: Explore pricing approaches, packaging, and likely trade-offs.

skills.name: pmx-market-entry

skills.description: Plan entry into a market, segment, geography, or channel.

skills.name: pmx-strategic-options

skills.description: Generate and compare strategic options before making a decision.

skills.name: pmx-roadmap

skills.name: pmx-roadmap-narrative

skills.name: pmx-risk-analysis

skills.name: pmx-prioritize-features

skills.name: pmx-rice-scoring

skills.name: pmx-impact-effort-matrix

skills.name: pmx-cost-benefit-analysis

skills.name: pmx-opportunity-scoring

skills.name: pmx-capacity-planning

skills.name: pmx-dependency-mapping

skills.name: pmx-scope-definition

skills.name: pmx-backlog-refinement

skills.name: pmx-priority-memo

skills.name: pmx-write-prd

skills.name: pmx-requirements-definition

skills.name: pmx-acceptance-criteria

skills.name: pmx-user-stories

skills.name: pmx-task-breakdown

skills.name: pmx-stakeholder-update

skills.name: pmx-status-report

skills.name: pmx-channel-strategy

skills.name: pmx-messaging-framework

skills.name: pmx-launch-plan
